EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRing2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides extended access to members that identify a ring and define its behavior.

[Guid("6011FA75-0C4A-11D6-9FA9-00C04F6BDF0D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRing2 : IRing, IPath, ICurve, IGeometry
